value.found_quote: Agent teams let you coordinate multiple Claude Code instances working together. One session acts as the team lead, coordinating work, assigning tasks, and synthesizing results. Teammates work independently, each in its own context window, and communicate directly with each other.
value.rationale: The page clearly substantiates the claim that Anthropic offers Agent Teams for Claude Code, describing the ability to coordinate multiple independent Claude Code sessions working together as a team, led by a team lead (the main Claude Code session), with a shared task list and peer-to-peer messaging (via a Mailbox system). The claim's description closely matches the page content. However, the lifecycle status is experimental/preview — the page states "Agent teams are experimental and disabled by default" and require enabling via `CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS`, indicating this is not yet generally available.
